tools.title: Apartment Application Readiness Checklist
tools.summary: Use this free checklist to organize the documents and facts needed before apartment application readiness.
checklist: Write down the exact application, reviewer, or document request.
Gather truthful supporting documents before drafting any explanation.
Check dates, names, amounts, addresses, and account details.
Separate facts you can prove from context you simply want to explain.
Save copies of anything you send and note when you sent it.
